allow: Bash(node -e "const m=require\('./dist/manifest.json'\); const loader=m.content_scripts[0].js[0]; const fs=require\('fs'\); const txt=fs.readFileSync\('dist/'+loader,'utf8'\); const mm=txt.match\(/assets\\/[^\\"']+\\.js/\); console.log\(mm[0]\);")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('./dist/manifest.json'\); console.log\('matches:', JSON.stringify\(m.content_scripts?.map\(c=>c.matches\)\)\); console.log\('host_permissions:', JSON.stringify\(m.host_permissions\)\); console.log\('permissions:', JSON.stringify\(m.permissions\)\); console.log\('js:', JSON.stringify\(m.content_scripts?.map\(c=>c.js\)\)\);")
